headline: SCOTUS SLAMS DOOR 🚪💥 on Mife Pill MAIL BAN 🍆📬‼️
text:
US Supreme Court 🏛️⚖️ just DROPPED the HAMMER 🔨🍑 restoring ABORTION PILL 💊🚫BABY access via MAIL 📬✨ – mifepristone queens 👑💅 can keep SLIDING into DMs (Direct Mail) without Louisiana Karens 😡🐊 CRYING about their 'unborn persons' 🙏👶! Two pill mamas 🏭💊 BEGGED SCOTUS to YEET 🚀 the lower court's THICC restrictions 📜🚫 after appeals simps 🤡 reinstated 'in-person only' BS like it's 1999 😩⏰. Thursday's STAY order 🛑🔥 blocks that NOPE while lawsuit DRAGS into 2026 🐌⚖️ – pills STAY AVAILABLE especially in BAN STATES 🚫🗺️ where abortions are ILLEGAL AF but MAIL MAGIC 🪄📮 saves the day!

Abortion pills 💊💥 are the #1 PREGGO TERMINATORS 🤰❌ in USA – more common than Taylor Swift breakups 💔🎤 or Elon xAI flops 🚀😭! FDA 🧪👨‍⚕️ in 2023 said 'TELEMEDICINE GO BRRRR' 📱💨 letting docs SHIP PILLS sans face-to-face like Uber Eats for oopsies 🍔🤰. Louisiana 🍑🐊 sued FDA last Oct 🚫📜 claiming mail mife = BAN BUSTING 💣 – 'Every FDA pill CANCELS our sacred conception cult 🙏👶!' whined the appeals cucks 🤡📞 temporarily forcing IRL pickups 🙄🛒.

Pill bosses 🏭💰 rushed to SCOTUS emergency docket 🚨⚖️ and BOOM 💥 – STAY GRANTED no cap, no reasoning attached like a ghosted Tinder swipe 👻🍆! Conservative daddies Clarence Thomas 🧓⚖️ and Sammy Alito 😤🕶️ DISSENTED HARD 🤬📣: Thomas SPILLED 'Mail mife ILLEGAL in LA, so manufacturers ain't blocking for CRIMINAL PROFITS 🤑🚫!' Savage shade 💅🔥 but MAJORITY said HOLD MY ROBE 👗⚖️ – access REMAINS till full case drops!

Mife's the FIRST PILL 💊1️⃣ in FDA's two-pill ABORTION ORGY 💦🔪 (w/ miso for the finish 😩💨), widely stocked in LEGAL STATES 🟢🗺️. COVID chaos 🦠😷 lifted in-person req in 2021 📦✅, made PERMANENT 2023 ✌️📮 – but post-Roe v Wade OVERTURN 🥚🚫 (SCOTUS said 'STATES DECIDE' 🗽📜), 20+ red states went FULL BAN MODE 🚫❤️! Unanimous SCOTUS slapdown earlier this year 🖐️💥 left door CRACKED for more drama, but TODAY? MAIL PILLS MOONING 🍑🌙 the haters – pro-choice squad POPPIN' CHAMPAGNE 🥂🎉 while Thomas simps for fetal fanfic 📖👶! Louisiana's ban? C UCKED 😩🐔 by nationwide postage power! #MifepristoneMoons 🚀💊
